title: Server Prototype
description: This pack is the mods for a building and tech based server me and my friends are starting together.
body:
This pack is the mods for a building and tech based server me and my friends are starting together. 
- it uses create with a couple of it's addons like steam & rails, dreams & desires, deco, big cannons, bells & whistles, enchantment industry, and numismatics. 
- It has cooking mods based around farmer's delightlike end's delight, nether's delight, aquatic delight, and create: slice & dice
- It has some quality of life things such as controlling, appleskins, mod menu, iris EMF, ETF, JEI, JER, JEB, etc. 
- It has lots of performace stuff like sodium, indium, lithium, ferritecore, and immediatly fast.
